bargaining_unit_name: New Jersey State Policemen's Benevolent Association, Inc., Local No. 11, Trenton, New Jersey (uniformed and non-uniformed officers, police officers, and police officers/detectives)
binding_arbitration_statute: New Jersey Employer-Employee Relations Act (N.J.S.A. 34:13A-1 et seq., Ch. 13A)
total_comp_note: Located by browsing the NJ PERC public-sector-contracts index directly by employer name (StartKey=Trenton), not generic web search, then confirmed via a targeted exact-filename search. Document is a City Council resolution (Resolution 23-333) authorizing execution of the CBA, with the full CBA text and signature page attached; full agreement dated July 6, 2023. Overlaps the already-ingested Trenton non-safety row (nj_trenton_other_2019, AFSCME Local 2281, 2019-2023) for the full 2019-2023 period -- a genuine cycle-overlapping matched pair.
